【 Gabriel 消息總匯 】

-《電訊報》Sam Dean【 Tier 3 】：阿仙奴希望能達成 Gabriel 的轉會，球員仍未和任何俱樂部達成協議。 這筆轉會之前是由 Raul Sanllehi 主導的，目前正由伊度、阿迪達和法赫米共同推進。

-《衛報》Fabrizio Romano【 Tier 1 】：如果拿坡里出售 Koulibaly，Gabriel 將成為他們的首要目標。 巴西後衛需要一些時間來做決定，阿仙奴目前已經和里爾達成了轉會協議。 曼聯只是在幾天前聯繫了球員的經紀人。

-《迪馬濟奧》【 Tier 1 】：拿坡里向 Gabriel 方面提出希望能再給他們一些時間，他們正在等待曼城推動 Koulibaly 的轉會。 Raul Sanllehi 的離開耽誤了阿仙奴在這筆轉會的進度，目前正試圖與球員達成協議。 曼聯有可能在最後時刻介入。

- 法國《TeleFoot》【 Tier 3 】：里爾分別和阿仙奴、愛華頓、拿坡里達成了轉會費協議，Gabriel 本人更傾向於阿仙奴（ 給出了5年合同 ），昨晚拿坡里也給出了一份新的offer在做最後的努力，球員將在24小時內決定去向。

Arsenal are still in negotiations with Real Madrid over another loan for Dani Ceballos for next season, according to reports in Spain.

El Desmarque report that Arsenal are currently in negotiations with Real Madrid over the possibility of another loan for Dani Ceballos next season. The Gunners aren’t keen to make a major financial investment in the player this summer. They’re reportedly pushing for a loan rather than a permanent transfer and requesting they split his salary with Real. El Desmarque claim Florentino Perez is unlikely to accept this formula.

As we covered previously, it appears Real Madrid are trying to raise larger bids by recalling Ceballos for pre-season training. Despite a rift between the player and head coach Zinedine Zidane, the club are posturing as if they’re willing to give him a shot in the side.

But Ceballos is keen on a return to the Premier League and Arsenal. He sees it as a good way to continue to get minutes and push for the Spanish European Championship squad.

Real Betis are also in the mix, with Ceballos open to a return to his former club. The obvious advantage of this move being a stay in Spain closer to those making the national team decisions.

This one could drag on for a while longer if Arsenal don’t significantly up their offer, which seems unlikely.

Arsenal have told Thomas Partey and his camp that they’ll pay his release clause to Atletico Madrid soon, according to a report.

TheAFCBell report that Arsenal have told Thomas Partey they’ll pay the value of his release clause soon. They claim the player will complete a move by the end of August or early September at the latest. The club reportedly have complete agreement over a four-year contract.

Those claims run in contrast to the stories we covered earlier this week that Atletico believe Partey will stay and Arsenal won’t activate the clause. Obviously, if the Gunners do pay up, there’s nothing the La Liga club can do about it.

Normally, I don’t like to give attention to the ‘ITK’ accounts on social media. But whilst I wouldn’t entirely trust TheAFCBell yet, they’ve built up some credibility with their reporting on Thomas Partey so far.

Pretty much everything they’ve said has ended up reported by a more reliable outlet not long afterwards. For example, they were the first to report on Atletico rejecting a Partey-Guendouzi swap, days before Fabrizio Romano and others confirmed it.

Then again, this is their boldest claim yet. It’s hard to extrapolate from information on lesser developments. Ultimately we’ll only know how reliable they are when the deal goes through or the window ends.

Arsenal draw up 5-year contract for Gabriel, Napoli increase wage offer

Just when it looked like the Gabriel Magalhaes saga was about to come to a conclusion, reports in France have thrown it all wide open again with Napoli putting more money in front of the player.

Lille have now reportedly accepted offers for Gabriel Magalhaes from Arsenal, Napoli and Everton, who were supposed to have withdrawn from the race.

According to Telefoot in France Arsenal have offered the 22-year-old defender a five-year deal which he is keen to accept but Napoli have upped their salary offer for the player ‘considerably’.

It is expected that this will all come to some sort of conclusion by the end of the working week. Then again, the Lille president also thought it would all be sorted out by the end of July, yet here we still are.

Napoli are also keen to sign Sokratis, even if they also manage to sign Gabriel.

韋利安：路爾斯求我入「廠」

【Now Sports】韋利安轉投阿仙奴後透露，巴西同鄉大衛路爾斯曾「懇求他轉會」。

巴西翼鋒韋利安（Willian）約滿車路士，以自由身轉投倫敦對頭阿仙奴，簽約3年，周薪達到22萬鎊。

「大衛路爾斯很高興，我們在國家隊並肩作戰，又曾在車仔合作，現在一齊來到阿仙奴。」32歲的韋利安透過兵工廠官網表示：「他說『來阿仙奴吧，我很想你來呀』。」

「路爾斯是優秀的球員，很興奮與他再度合作，他過去幫過我很多忙，因為他是熱心助人的人。」穿上12號戰衣的韋利安補充道。

韋利安在車仔贏過兩次英超，下季又能踢歐聯，偏偏轉投今季排名第8的兵工廠，真的與錢無關？

雲加講波：萊比錫出局犯兩大錯

【Now Sports】對於德甲黑馬萊比錫在歐聯4強止步，前阿仙奴領隊雲加直言：「犯了兩大錯誤所致！」

法國籍主帥雲加（Arsene Wenger）離開阿仙奴後，暫未重返球壇，盡情講波，深受球迷歡迎。

談到萊比錫以0:3不敵巴黎聖日耳門，雲加賽後分析道：「踢波，你要展示自己的長處，令敵人無法發揮長處，但萊比錫辦不到。PSG個人能力強，上半場領先2球，萊比錫已失去晉級希望，因為前線根本沒有真正射手。」

「首先，萊比錫在近柱的兩名守將，相隔太開，以致被馬昆奴斯找到空位，他是擅頂之人，這是其中一個大錯。」雲加頭頭是道再說。

談到萊比錫門將是否犯錯，法國人點頭答：「是的，這是大錯，古拿治未入局，不應該作出賭搏，半場落後0:1和0:2，差距很大。」

How Arteta changed the culture around the club

Mikel Arteta knew it was going to be a big project.

Our head coach arrived midway through December and could see that the energy and culture around the club needed to change.

So just how did Arteta turn our struggling side into Emirates FA Cup champions within eight months?

"The first thing was that I got everyone together, the staff and the players, and I told them what I thought about them and why this wasn't working," he told Arsenal Digital. "If we were going to continue like this, it was never going to work.

"The first thing we had to do was get back all together with the same agenda and with the same intentions. The foundations have to be really strong in order to create something and we started to do that. I explained my view of how we could do it, we could change things and monitor them daily, but we started to apply some things and they really started to work.

"We had to create the right culture for our club and it has to be an environment that first of all everybody has to respect each other, that we have to work together and we have to express the passion and how we lucky we are to be where we are. That's the first one to start with.

"Without that unity, we cannot drive this massive ship that we have to manage with Arsenal, and the expectations that are involved with the club. The moment we started to do that, I started to change a few things that, for me, were really relevant. The players got behind them, the staff got behind them and we started to see some results straight away.

"As well, we have to identify our weaknesses and our strengths, and they have to be aware of our weaknesses. We can have weaknesses that we have to hide but we cannot have weaknesses within our structure of our club.

"Then we have to maximise our strengths, that we have a lot of, and at that moment I didn't believe that we were doing that. We have huge potential, we have no limits, it depends on us not the opponent or other clubs. It depends on our stats and that was something that needed to change, so that's what I was encouraging all the time, to do that."

【Now Sports】爸爸與奧斯爾對賭，卻要拿新生愛女的名字做賭注，咁就一世！

今年3月，來自美國的阿仙奴球迷羅賓遜在Twitter表示小孩預計7月出世，只要德國中場奧斯爾（Mesut Ozil）回應他，便會為嬰兒改名「Ozil」。

「老友，我們約定好，我沒讓你失望，今次輪到你了，7月時我要見到出世紙。」他沒想到奧斯爾火速回應。

5個月後，羅賓遜兌現承諾，上載照片證實女兒全名叫「Mara Ozil Robinson」，並披上了奧斯爾的阿仙奴10號球衣。

羅賓遜遂感謝奧斯爾回應：「約定完成，她值得每一秒的等待，母女平安。」31歲的奧斯爾恭喜之餘，亦讚粉絲講得出、做得到，絕對是有口齒的真男人。
